messages.author: taedryn
messages.text: I'm working on a BBS for MeshCore, and I'm at the point where I'm doing the MeshCore integration. I'm trying to figure out the best way to have it present itself within the system. I want it to interact properly with the existing apps, and it will be interactive with the user, so the user can send simple commands to move rooms, or post a message, or read messages. It looks like advertising as a room server is probably the right choice, but I have a few questions. Does the room server handshake transmit incoming node pubkey information as part of the introduction (node pubkey to room server - obviously the room server has to advert before anyone can talk to it)? It looks like it must, I was just able to log in to my room server after changing my private key and without advertising that new key, but I want to make sure I'm understanding that exchange correctly. Once a node has logged in, it's effectively the same thing as a DM conversation, right? Or are there important differences between room server interaction vs DM interaction?
messages.content_html: I'm working on a BBS for MeshCore, and I'm at the point where I'm doing the MeshCore integration. I'm trying to figure out the best way to have it present itself within the system. I want it to interact properly with the existing apps, and it will be interactive with the user, so the user can send simple commands to move rooms, or post a message, or read messages. It looks like advertising as a room server is probably the right choice, but I have a few questions. Does the room server handshake transmit incoming node pubkey information as part of the introduction (node pubkey to room server - obviously the room server has to advert before anyone can talk to it)? It looks like it must, I was just able to log in to my room server after changing my private key and without advertising that new key, but I want to make sure I'm understanding that exchange correctly. Once a node has logged in, it's effectively the same thing as a DM conversation, right? Or are there important differences between room server interaction vs DM interaction?
